name: Form: Update Field

description.en: Update a field in an existing form.
description.de: Ein Feld eines bestehenden Formulars aktualisieren.

bot: Call form-get first to read the current definition. Then use this warp to update a specific field.

actions.prompt: Update the field with `as` value "{{fieldKey}}" in actions[0].inputs by applying: {{changes}}. Keep the `as` key unchanged unless a rename is explicitly requested. If updating descriptions, provide both English and German. Preserve everything else exactly.

inputs.name: Field Key
inputs.bot: The `as` value (camelCase key) of the field to update. Read it from the current definition.

description.en: What to change (e.g. make it required, rename to 'Mobile Number', change type to email)
description.de: Was geändert werden soll (z.B. Pflichtfeld machen, umbenennen in 'Handynummer', Typ auf email ändern)

inputs.name: Current Definition
inputs.bot: The full current form definition JSON string. Fetch it from form-get and pass it here verbatim.

inputs.name: Form ID
inputs.bot: The form's hash ID. Carry it from context — never ask the user.
